northwind.note: Orders joins to [Order Details] by OrderID and to Customers by CustomerID
Sales totals come from UnitPrice * Quantity * (1 - Discount) on [Order Details]

sec_edgar.note: annual_financials contains ticker, fiscal_year, metric, and value_billions
revenue is stored as metric='revenue' and year comparisons use fiscal_year

bird.note: loan joins to account by account_id; account joins client through disp where type='OWNER'
district.A3 stores the region name, and loan.status uses the raw BIRD codes A, B, C, D
